children.heading: Agricultural product
children.label: 1 Agricultural product
children.text: The term “agricultural product” means any agricultural commodity or product, whether raw or processed, including any commodity or product derived from livestock that is marketed in the United States for human or livestock consumption.

children.heading: Botanical pesticides
children.label: 2 Botanical pesticides
children.text: The term “botanical pesticides” means natural pesticides derived from plants.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “certifying agent” means the chief executive officer of a State or, in the case of a State that provides for the Statewide election of an official to be responsible solely for the administration of the agricultural operations of the State, such official, and any person (including private entities) who is accredited by the Secretary as a certifying agent for the purpose of certifying a farm or handling operation as a certified organic farm or handling operation in accordance with this chapter.

children.label: i
children.text: accredited in accordance with ; orsection 6514(d) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: accredited by a foreign government that acted under an equivalency agreement negotiated between the United States and the foreign government from which the agricultural product is imported.

children.heading: Certified organic farm
children.label: 4 Certified organic farm
children.text: The term “certified organic farm” means a farm, or portion of a farm, or site where agricultural products or livestock are produced, that is certified by the certifying agent under this chapter as utilizing a system of organic farming as described by this chapter.

children.heading: Certified organic handling operation
children.label: 5 Certified organic handling operation
children.text: The term “certified organic handling operation” means any operation, or portion of any handling operation, that is certified by the certifying agent under this chapter as utilizing a system of organic handling as described under this chapter.

children.heading: Crop year
children.label: 6 Crop year
children.text: The term “crop year” means the normal growing season for a crop as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Governing State official
children.label: 7 Governing State official
children.text: The term “governing State official” means the chief executive official of a State or, in the case of a State that provides for the Statewide election of an official to be responsible solely for the administration of the agricultural operations of the State, such official, who administers an organic certification program under this chapter.

children.heading: Handle
children.label: 8 Handle
children.text: The term “handle” means to sell, process or package agricultural products.

children.heading: Handler
children.label: 9 Handler
children.text: The term “handler” means any person engaged in the business of handling agricultural products, except such term shall not include final retailers of agricultural products that do not process agricultural products.

children.label: A
children.text: receives or otherwise acquires agricultural products; and

children.label: B
children.text: processes, packages, or stores such products.

children.heading: Livestock
children.label: 11 Livestock
children.text: The term “livestock” means any cattle, sheep, goats, swine, poultry, equine animals used for food or in the production of food, fish used for food, wild or domesticated game, or other nonplant life.

children.heading: National List
children.label: 12 National List
children.text: The term “National List” means a list of approved and prohibited substances as provided for in .section 6517 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: to provide documentation sufficient to verify that an agricultural product imported for sale in the United States satisfies the requirement under ;section 6514(c) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the origin;

children.label: ii
children.text: the destination;

children.label: iii
children.text: the certifying agent issuing the national organic program import certificate;

children.label: iv
children.text: the harmonized tariff code, if a harmonized tariff code exists for the agricultural product;

children.label: v
children.text: the total weight; and

children.label: vi
children.text: the organic standard to which the agricultural product is certified; and

children.label: C
children.text: that is not more than otherwise required under an equivalency agreement negotiated between the United States and the foreign government.

children.heading: Organic plan
children.label: 14 Organic plan
children.text: The term “organic plan” means a plan of management of an organic farming or handling operation that has been agreed to by the producer or handler and the certifying agent and that includes written plans concerning all aspects of agricultural production or handling described in this chapter including crop rotation and other practices as required under this chapter.

children.heading: Organically produced
children.label: 15 Organically produced
children.text: The term “organically produced” means an agricultural product that is produced and handled in accordance with this chapter.

children.heading: Person
children.label: 16 Person
children.text: The term “person” means an individual, group of individuals, corporation, association, organization, cooperative, or other entity.

children.heading: Pesticide
children.label: 17 Pesticide
children.text: The term “pesticide” means any substance which alone, in chemical combination, or in any formulation with one or more substances, is defined as a pesticide in the Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act ( et seq.).7 U.S.C. 136

children.heading: Processing
children.label: 18 Processing
children.text: The term “processing” means cooking, baking, heating, drying, mixing, grinding, churning, separating, extracting, cutting, fermenting, eviscerating, preserving, dehydrating, freezing, or otherwise manufacturing, and includes the packaging, canning, jarring, or otherwise enclosing food in a container.

children.heading: Producer
children.label: 19 Producer
children.text: The term “producer” means a person who engages in the business of growing or producing food or feed.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 20 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: State organic certification program
children.label: 21 State organic certification program
children.text: The term “State organic certification program” means a program that meets the requirements of , is approved by the Secretary, and that is designed to ensure that a product that is sold or labeled as “organically produced” under this chapter is produced and handled using organic methods.section 6506 of this title

children.heading: Synthetic
children.label: 22 Synthetic
children.text: The term “synthetic” means a substance that is formulated or manufactured by a chemical process or by a process that chemically changes a substance extracted from naturally occurring plant, animal, or mineral sources, except that such term shall not apply to substances created by naturally occurring biological processes.
